spec.reasoning: Previous attempts failed because blank_row_insert and distractor_column insertions shifted data, breaking the many absolute cell references in the instruction. Since risk flags indicate instruction_references_absolute_rows and task_references_specific_cell_addresses, any row/column shifting layout is unsafe. I use 'skip' for layout to avoid shifting. I rename 'Number' to 'Seq' and 'kms' to 'dist' (both abbreviation-level descriptiveness). 'kms' also appears as a data value in H17, so I include a data_value_rename. I add a distractor column 'Rate' after the last column, which won't shift any existing columns. I avoid renaming 'Category' and '%' since they appear as common English words in the instruction.
